'''Chabak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and the original owner of [[Chabak's]], located aboard the [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']]. He disappeared when the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] vanished under mysterious circumstances; upon its reappearance, two of his relatives, [[Padda]] and [[Quink]], took over the [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] den.<ref name="Zirtran's Anchor" />
